26/06/2025, 17:26 List of written notices to appoint an external auditor | AUSTRAC

’@ Australian Government
““ AUSTRAC

ist of written notices to
appoint an external auditor

Home / List of written notices to appoint an external auditor

Cee
“{-fisn
Flas

We can require a reporting entity to appoint an external auditor if we have reasonable
grounds to suspect that the reporting entity:

e has not taken — or is not taking — appropriate action to identify, mitigate and
manage the ML/TF risk its business or organisation may reasonably face

e has not complied with AML/CTF law.
You can find out more about the consequences of not complying.

We publish these notices in the interests of transparency and accountability.

2022
